ksa_text: Skill in implementing AI application guardrails, including input validation, output filtering, safety classifiers, and human-in-the-loop intervention points.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.396) to justify inclusion for the Director of Analytics. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Analytics roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI/ML Engineering is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Analytics. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Analytics competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.396) and edge-domain placement (AI/ML Engineering) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Analytics. All passes support exclusion.
